# Musayir Formation

**Summary**: A lower Miocene carbonate formation.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2022-al-sadah|Al-Sadah, 2022]] identified the Musayir Formation as a key component of the Raghama sequence.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Composed of calcareous sandstones, oysters, foraminifera, and ooids. ([[2022-al-sadah|Al-Sadah, 2022, p. 42]])
